---
title: "Import and prepare eel data"
author: "Viktor Thunell"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    fig-width: 8
knitr: 
  opts_chunk:
    fig.align: center
editor: source
execute: 
  echo: true
  eval: true
  cache: false
---

## Introduction 


## Load libraries
  
```{r libs}
#| message: false

pkgs <- c("tidyverse", "devtools", "purrr", "patchwork","DBI","odbc","arrow","sf","sdmTMB")


if(length(setdiff(pkgs, rownames(installed.packages()))) > 0){
  install.packages(setdiff(pkgs, rownames(installed.packages())), dependencies = T)
}

invisible(lapply(pkgs, library, character.only = T))

# # Source code for map plots
devtools::source_url("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VThunell/diasp-lht/main/R/functions/map-plot.R") # message of SHA-1 hash for file

options(ggplot2.continuous.colour = "viridis")

# Set path
home <- here::here()

```
## Get data

### Sötebasen

```{r}
sb_ind <- read.delim("/Users/vitl0001/Documents/Projects/SWEel-lhts/data/ÅlindividerSötebasen.csv", sep=";", dec=",", fileEncoding="Latin1")

colnames(sb_ind) 

sb_ind2 <- sb_ind %>%
  filter(!(is.na(Längd1) & is.na(Längd2) & is.na(Vikt2) & is.na(Vikt2) & Åldersprov == "Nej")) %>%
  rename(length1 = Längd1,
         length2 = Längd2,
         weight1 = Vikt1,
         weight2 = Vikt2,
         age = Ålder,
         sex = Kön,
         stage = Stadium
         ) %>%
  # These uses "." as dec
  mutate(across(c(WGS84_E_Vatten, WGS84_N_Vatten, WGS84_N_Plats, WGS84_E_Plats), readr::parse_number),
         # when Plats coords are missing, we use the Vatten name. ~800 eels lacks coords
         lon = if_else(is.na(WGS84_E_Plats), WGS84_E_Vatten, WGS84_E_Plats),
         lat = if_else(is.na(WGS84_N_Plats), WGS84_N_Vatten, WGS84_N_Plats),
         db = "sb"
         )
  
sb_ind2 %>% 
  distinct()
  
```

### KUL

```{r}
# Connect to SLU-server:
AQ_con <- dbConnect(odbc(),
                    Driver = "SQL Server",
                    Server = "aquadw_prod.db.slu.se",
                    USER = "vitl0001",
                    Database = "AquaDW_prod",
                    Trusted_Connection = "True",
                   encoding = "utf-8")
 
# Extract the table with all individual eel data.
 
KUL <- dbGetQuery(AQ_con,"select * from AquaDW_prod.mart.KUL_INDIVID_NEW where Art = 'Ål'")
 
#!!!! Make a note of the date of export and save a copy with the date in the name for publication !!!!
```
<!-- Error in `dbConnect()`: -->
<!-- ! ODBC failed with error 00000 from [unixODBC][Driver Manager]. -->
<!-- ✖ Can't open lib 'SQL Server' : file not found -->
<!-- ℹ From nanodbc/nanodbc.cpp:1184. -->
<!-- Run `rlang::last_trace()` to see where the error occurred. -->

## Join data
```{r}
df <- sb_ind2
```

## Retrieve spatial basin info 

```{r}
# make data spatial object
df_sf <- st_as_sf(df %>% drop_na(lat,lon), coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326,  remove = FALSE)

ca <- open_dataset("/Users/vitl0001/Documents/Projects/DIASPARA/Habitat_db/catchments/", format = "parquet")

ca_sf <- ca %>%
  collect() %>%
  mutate(geometry = st_as_sfc(shape, EWKB = TRUE, crs = 4326)) %>%
  st_as_sf(sf_column_name = "geometry") %>%
  select(main_bas) %>%
  group_by(main_bas) %>%
  summarise(groups = "drop")
  # summarise(geometry = st_union(shape_area) ) %>%
  # ungroup()
  
df_ca <- df_sf %>%
  st_join(ca_sf, join = st_nearest_feature, left = T) 

```

## Data points in space and catchments

```{r}
plot_map_Nord +
  geom_sf(data = ca_sf, aes(color = factor(main_bas)), linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_sf(data = ca_sf, color = "lightblue", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_point(data = df_ca %>% drop_na(lat,lon) %>% add_utm_columns(ll_names = c("lon", "lat"), utm_crs = 32633), aes(X*1000, Y*1000), size = 0.3, color = "#440154FF") 
 #color = db # color on database.
```

## Plot silver data
```{r}
sb_ind2 %>%
  #mutate(sex = ifelse(sex == 1, "m","f")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(age, length1, color = factor(sex)), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_point(size = 0.1) +
  facet_wrap(~stage) +
#  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 13, 1) ) +
  theme_minimal()  

data.biph %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_density(aes(x = tot.age, color = basin, fill = sex), alpha = 0.3) +
  xlim(0, 13) +

data.biph %>% 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_density(aes(x = length_mm, color = basin, fill = sex), alpha = 0.3)

data.biph %>% 
  mutate(sex = ifelse(sex == 1, "m","f")) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_density(aes(x = length_mm, fill = factor(sex)), alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~tot.age, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(caption = "length density by age") 

# age at smoltification by spatial unit
data.biph %>%
  mutate(sex = ifelse(sex == 1, "m","f")) %>%
  filter(age.type == "both") %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_density(aes(x = juv.age, fill = factor(sex)),  alpha = 0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~spat.unit) +
  labs(x = "age at smoltification") 
  xlim(-1, 5)

# juvenile size at age
data.biph %>%
  filter(age.type == "juve.only",
         #spat.unit == "Upper-Normandy"
         ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = juv.age, y =length_mm)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", formula = y ~ s(x, k = 3)) +
  #geom_smooth(method = lm) +
  facet_wrap(~spat.unit)
  
data.biph %>%
  filter(!age.type == "sea.only",
         #spat.unit == "Brittany"
         ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tot.age, y =length_mm, color = age.type)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", formula = y ~ s(x, k = 3)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 13, 1), limit = c(0,NA) ) +
  #geom_smooth(method = lm) +
  facet_wrap(~spat.unit)

data.biph %>%
  #filter(age.type == "both") %>%
  mutate(sex = ifelse(sex == 1, "m","f")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(tot.age, length_mm, color = factor(smo_age))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~spat.unit) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 13, 1), limit = c(0,NA) ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
